title: Add support for binding function/task arguments by name

features.name: named_argument_binding_task_invocation
features.description: Code should include a task invocation with named argument binding using dot notation to specify arguments out of order
features.snippet:
task t(int a, int b); ... endtask
t(.b(1), .a(2));

features.name: named_argument_binding_function_invocation
features.description: Code should include a function invocation with named argument binding using dot notation
features.snippet:
function int foo(int x, int y); return x + y; endfunction
int result = foo(.y(2), .x(1));

features.name: named_argument_binding_constructor
features.description: Code should include a class constructor invocation with named argument binding
features.snippet:
class C; int a; int b; function new(int a, int b); ... endfunction endclass
C c = new(.b(1), .a(2));

features.name: chained_named_argument_binding
features.description: Code should include chained method calls with named argument binding
features.snippet:
class C; int x; function set_x(int v); x = v; endfunction endclass
C c = new(); c.set_x(.v(42));
